rows.label: qev042102_MSG0001
rows.name: Everyone in the caravan is being threatened with a massacre by the Growth...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0002
rows.name:
Lularita has never heard such a story, mo.
Who is saying such absolute nonsense, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0003
rows.name:
...This smells like an evil scheme, mo.
If you were told that and had something taken from you...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0004
rows.name: You should consult Lularita, the greatest warrior of this Drongo Caravan, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0005
rows.name: Hmm... Nalu has been acting like she has a lot of money lately, but did something happen, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0006
rows.name: That girl has a wicked side and would do anything for the sake of business.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0007
rows.name:
Lularita is getting a little worried, mo.
Do you know anything about it, Earthling, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_JNK0010
rows.name: Report

rows.label: qev042102_SEL0011
rows.name: Tell her everything about the request from Nalu.

rows.label: qev042102_JNK0020
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: qev042102_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask about Nalu's past misdeeds.

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0008
rows.name: Everyone in the caravan is being threatened with a massacre by the Growth!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0009
rows.name: And because of that, you fetched all sorts of Earthling items for Nalu, mo!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0010
rows.name: Selling food to starving travelers at outrageous prices...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0011
rows.name:
Selling cheap glass beads while claiming they are incredibly precious sparklies...
Anyway, she is terrible, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0012
rows.name: There are even rumors that she is now dealing with the Growth, which is strictly forbidden, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0013
rows.name:
...Eh!?
Were you also asked to do a favor for Nalu, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0014
rows.name: You wanted to help because everyone in the caravan is being threatened with a massacre by the Growth... !?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0015
rows.name: I have never heard such a story, mo!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0016
rows.name: I am certain... she is directly funneling the items you obtained to the Growth and making a massive profit, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0017
rows.name:
I cannot forgive that Nalu, mo!
We have to teach her a lesson, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0018
rows.name: Along with the Autonomous AI A-HAB and Nostalgia L-002 that Nalu said she wanted...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0019
rows.name: Could you catch a whole bunch of Bullet Flies for me, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0020
rows.name: Lularita will carefully rig them so that when she hands them over to the Growth, they will burst out with a BOOM and create a startling trap, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0021
rows.name: Will you do it, mo? I will show her exactly what happens when you do something so wicked in this Drongo Caravan, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0022
rows.name: Bullet Flies are dangerous insects that fly around exactly like bullets, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0023
rows.name: Lularita will skillfully use them to make a surprise bug bomb that will shock both Nalu and the Growth, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0024
rows.name: I am counting on you, mo! Along with the Autonomous AI A-HAB and Nostalgia L-002, please catch a whole bunch of Bullet Flies, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0025
rows.name:
How is it, how is it, mo?
Along with the things Nalu wanted...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0026
rows.name:
A whole bunch of Bullet Flies!
Did you obtain them, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0027
rows.name: Fumo! With this many Bullet Flies, I can make an incredible bug bomb, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0028
rows.name:
Wait just a minute, mo.
Lularita has been great at making these since I was little, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0029
rows.name:
Hmm, hmm, hmm~♪
Do this, and this, and wrap it up, mo~♪[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0030
rows.name:
It is done, mo!
Now, when that Nalu tries to hand this over to the Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0031
rows.name: BOOM! The Bullet Flies will burst out from the wrapped bag, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0032
rows.name:
And then the area will turn into hell, mo!
Hehe, take it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0033
rows.name: And make Nalu regret doing business with the likes of the Growth, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0034
rows.name: What will happen when Nalu hands that over to the Growth with the Bullet Fly bug bomb attached...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0035
rows.name: Just imagining it is getting me excited, mo~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev042102_MSG0036
rows.name:
Evil will perish!
The peace of the Drongo Caravan will be protected by Lularita, mo~![ST:wait ]
